'''Arvel Trace''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Sesid/Legends|Sesid]], the [[Draedan/Legends|Draedan]] homeworld.

==Biography==
Though he left the natives mostly alone for the early part of his term in office, he eventually decided to supply the dictatorial leaders of two major Draedan nations, [[Feynir]] and [[Maeril]], with Imperial weapons. In return for using these weapons to subdue other Draedan nations, the Imperial-allied Draedans would give the Imperials a share of the spoils. This plan backfired when other Draedan nations retaliated by allying against his clients. These nations announced allegiance to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and traded the valuable medical supplies of Sesid's oceans to weapons [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. Trace's forces were spread too thinly to effectively stop this trade, and Sesid was not valuable enough to warrant reinforcements.
